name: Streamside Trout
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the trout with salt and pepper.
2. Mix together salt, pepper, and cornmeal in a paper bag.
3. Coat each piece of trout by shaking it in the bag.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
5. Place coated trout into the hot oil.
6. Cook until golden brown on both sides.
